cutting-stock.reason: Codex CLI (gpt-5.5, xhigh) re-attempted this run and again returned 'You've hit your usage limit' (resets 23:19 local). Fell back to manual re-derivation: the main agent read the full Gilmore-Gomory 1961 primary text (incl. eqs 4-7, the C*A^{-1}=multipliers identity, the DP recursion, the slack-drop proof p.851, and the worked example cost 170 p.858) and the Desrosiers-Lubbecke column-generation primer, and verified every equation, sign, and the worked-example numbers against those retrieved sources. The scipy code block was executed (LP bound 452.25 on a test instance) to confirm faithfulness.
